summary: Skip emission of the placeholder apikey_placeholder=<KEY> query parameter that the auth template adds to every live request.
reason: Spec declares auth.type: api_key, in: query as a workaround for the lack of path-based auth support. The real auth lives in the URL path each command builds; the query-string copy is harmless garbage that clutters logs and exposes credential material in URL renders.
validated_outcome: Live observation confirms no apikey_placeholder=... query param in outgoing requests; verify and dogfood still PASS.
